info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: DfzeH prasahane yO stAM DarzayedDarzatItyuBe ' (Slo. 181) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na ca SatruM prapaSyAmi yuDi yo naH praDarzayet' (BA॰Adi॰30.39) aBiBavet avamAnayet kadarTayediti vA'rTaH
'vAyurUpeRa vA Sakro gurupatnIM praDarzayet' (=tasyAM sahasA pravarteta) (BA॰anu॰40.44)
'na tvAM kroDaH praDarzayet' (BA॰anu॰55.24) kzoBayet kzuBitaM kuryAdityarTaH
'evaM sanDarzitA sADvI kaTaM jIvitumutsahe' (hari॰2.118.11) sanDarzitA=balAddUzitA haWAtparAmfzwA
'ugrasenasya rUpeRa mAtaraM te vyaDarzayat' (hari0 22892) vyAkulayat viprAkarot
'kftAntavaSyAni yadA suKAni duHKAni vA yanna viDarzayanti…' (BA0 SAM0 28610) na viDarzayanti na prasahante na kadarTayanti
'mA vAM vfko mA vfkIrADarzIt' (f0 11834) avamantumapakartuM vA mA sma DarzIt na jAtu DfzRuyAt
'mAyAM devasya nakirA daDarza' (f0 5856) na kaScid avahelayitumutsahate ityAha
'smftyAcAravyapetena mArgeRADarzitaH parEH Avedayati cedrAjYe vyavahArapadaM hi tat' (yAjYa0 25).. ADarzito'BiBUtaH
'na bahavaH samaSakannArBakA aBi dADfzuH' (aTarva0 1273) nABidADfzuH=na prasehire=nADicakrire nABibaBUvuH arBakAH=alpAH
'kasta indra prati vajraM daDarza' (f0 8969) pratidaDarza prasahate pratigfhRAti pratiruRadDi
'nikziptametad Buvi pannagAstu ratnaM samAsAdya parAmfSeyuH yakzAstaTocCizwaDftaM surASca nidrAvaSAdvA pariDarzayeyu' (BA0 ASva0 5723).. DarzayeyurAskandeyuH
